name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I saw your subscription with us wrapped up — totally okay, life shifts and schedules change. No guilt trip here.

If and when you'd like to come back for a cleaning or check-in, I wanted to send you a small thank-you: 20% off your next visit.

Your code: {{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and you can use it at checkout when you book.

And if something about your last experience with us wasn't quite right — the timing, the cost, the chair-side part — I'd genuinely love to hear. Just hit reply. I read every one, and we're always trying to make dental care feel less scary, not more.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads-up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week. No pressure, just wanted you to have it if you need us. :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
